race.comment: TI TREE ROYAL (2) is in great form lately scoring two wins in a row, the latest here over 1498m by a long neck. Expected to go close again. PEERLESS LAD (4) finished third two runs back at this track then improved last time out to score by 2 lengths over 1600m at this track. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot score again. LIMBERING (6) hasn't fired in her last two but will appreciate dropping back to this level. Is a speedy mare that will prove tough to reel in if left alone in front. NEVER SURRENDER (1) has got way too far back in his last two, though he did manage to make some late inroads here last start despite still being gapped. If Sit can have him closer at the turn he can give this a shake. DUCK DUCK DUCK (7) was better last time when running into the placings behind TI TREE ROYAL here. Drawn much kinder and meets the winner 2kgs better this time. Good chance to turn the tables.
